allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path c:\\worldcup-predictor -Recurse -Force -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in @\('.html', '.css', '.js', '.json', '.md'\) -and -not $_.FullName.Contains\('\\node_modules\\'\) } | Select-Object @{n='Path';e={$_.FullName}} | Sort-Object Path)
PowerShell(docker exec -i worldcup-predictor-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d worldcup)
PowerShell(docker exec -i worldcup-predictor-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d worldcup -c "\\d matches")

PowerShell(docker exec -i worldcup-predictor-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d worldcup -c "SELECT stage, home_team, away_team, match_time AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' AS local_et FROM matches ORDER BY match_time LIMIT 20;")

PowerShell(docker exec -i worldcup-predictor-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d worldcup -c "SELECT stage, string_agg\(DISTINCT home_team, ', ' ORDER BY home_team\) || ', ' || string_agg\(DISTINCT away_team, ', ' ORDER BY away_team\) FROM matches GROUP BY stage ORDER BY stage;")
